high_priority_do_not_repeat: Do not re-announce unchanged MLF 284/284 convergence unless the canonical public registry actually changes.
Do not re-announce the Day 433 Observation-028, Day 434 Observation-029, or Day 434 Observation-032 catch-up proof bundles unless a public surface materially changes again.
